title: 2025.10.23Using a web-based POS with a mobile Terminal readerSummary:Learn how to integrate web-based POS systems with mobile Terminal readers using a React Native wrapper app. Connect M2 readers and Tap to Pay seamlessly.Author:Benjamin NuttinTopic:TerminalRead
